svg.text: • Word search (single word, 4-dir, no reuse) — DFS + visited[].
• Word search II (many words) — Trie + DFS with prune-on-find.
• Boggle solver — same as Word Search II, often with 8-directional moves.
• Number of islands — DFS/BFS connected components on a 0/1 grid.
• Surrounded regions — DFS from borders flips outside cells.
• Pacific Atlantic water flow — multi-source DFS from edges.
• Knight's tour / rat in a maze — backtracking with one-cell-at-a-time visit.
• Path with obstacles, unique paths, walls and gates — BFS or DP variants.
• Crossword / word-game engines: Boggle, Scrabble grid solving.
• OCR + lexicon: validate detected text against dictionary using grid traversal.
• Pathfinding in games (with backtracking when DP/A* not applicable).
• Image segmentation: connected-component labeling via DFS/BFS flood fill.
• PCB routing: trace candidate paths under obstacle and bend constraints.
Word Search is the cleanest training problem for grid DFS + visited bookkeeping.
